tool_args.label: Proposed double bus lanes Madison Avenue 23rd to 42nd

payload.location_text: Madison Avenue from East 23rd Street to East 42nd Street
payload.description: Extend existing 24/7 bus lanes from East 42nd Street to East 23rd Street; two 11-foot bus-only lanes on east side, 12-foot curbside parking/rush hour travel lane, and one 11-foot general travel lane on west side

normalized_location.raw_text: Madison Avenue from East 23rd Street to East 42nd Street

tool_args.label: Updated curb management on Madison Avenue

payload.location_text: Madison Avenue, East 23rd to East 42nd Street
payload.description: Maintain No Standing across east curb, add half-block left turn bays on west curb at 27th, 29th, 31st, 33rd Streets, add rush hour No Standing on west curb between 36th-37th Street, update meter timing. Retains ~78% of existing parking spaces.

normalized_location.raw_text: Madison Avenue, East 23rd to East 42nd Street

tool_args.label: Automated Camera Enforcement expansion for Madison Avenue

payload.location_text: M2 and M4 Local buses; future Madison Avenue bus lanes
payload.description: Automated Camera Enforcement (ACE) improves bus speeds and reliability by enforcing for vehicles driving in a bus lane, double parking, or standing at a bus stop. M2 and M4 Local buses undergoing ACE expansion; future update will include future Madison Avenue bus lanes.

normalized_location.raw_text: M2 and M4 Local buses; future Madison Avenue bus lanes
